message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam note {
  BackgroundColor #ffffe0
  BorderColor #999999
}

participant "app" as app
participant "apps" as apps
participant "ams" as ams

note right of app
  keyId 钥匙id
  cardId 通行证id
end note

app -> apps: 1 查询钥匙信息
apps -> ams: 2 查询钥匙信息 keyId 钥匙id，通行证id
activate ams
ams -> ams: 3 查询钥匙信息表 得到钥匙有效时间段，是否自动开门，授权开门时间段list，锁id
ams -> ams: 4 根据锁id查询锁的名称
ams -> ams: 5 根据卡号得到发卡机构名称
deactivate ams

ams --> apps: 6 返回有效时间段，授权开始时间段list，发卡机构名称
apps --> app: 7 返回结果

@enduml
